import Link from "next/link"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Search, Lock, Users, FileText, Database, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react"; import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"; export default async function LandingPage() { // Fetch platform stats conditionally const userCount = await prisma.user.count(); const noteCount = await prisma.note.count({ where: { status: "PUBLISHED" } }); const resourceCount = await prisma.resource.count({ where: { status: "PUBLISHED" } }); const showStats = userCount >= 10 || noteCount >= 10 || resourceCount >= 10; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

The "Google for DevOps"

One platform to find notes, resources, and events across the entire DevOps ecosystem. Built by engineers, for engineers.

Try: Docker networking • Kubernetes pods • AWS IAM • CI/CD pipeline
{/* Stats Section - Hidden if less than 10 total items per criteria */} {showStats && (
{userCount >= 10 && (

{userCount}+

Active Engineers

)} {noteCount >= 10 && (

{noteCount}+

Community Notes

)} {resourceCount >= 10 && (

{resourceCount}+

Curated Resources

)}
)} {/* Features & Topics */}

Everything you need to master DevOps

Community Notes

Deep dive into topics with beautifully formatted notes written and reviewed by the community. Find everything from beginner guides to advanced architectural breakdowns.

Curated Resources

Stop wasting time searching YouTube and random blogs. Discover the best PDFs, links, and video tutorials highly rated by other engineers.

Upcoming Events

Stay on top of webinars, community calls, local meetups, and certification deadlines. Never miss a critical date again.

{/* Coming Soon */}

On the Horizon

Community Chat

Planned

Real-time community chat is coming ΓÇö think Discord, but built exclusively for DevOps. Stay tuned.

Job Board

Planned

A community-curated job board is in the works ΓÇö no spam, only real opportunities from real engineers.

); }
